message:
fix(ci): resolve lint failures and test guard false positive (#1550)

- errcheck: handle fmt.Scanln return value (doctor_validate.go conflict
  resolved - main already has bufio.NewReader fix)
- gosec G204: nolint directive for validated exec.Command in config.go
- unparam: make maxRetries const in beginImmediateWithRetry
- test guard: exclude interactions.jsonl from watched files

Co-authored-by: turian <turian@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew

files.patch:
@@ -89,7 +89,7 @@ func TestMain(m *testing.M) {
 		"issues.jsonl",
 		"beads.jsonl",
 		"metadata.json",
-		"interactions.jsonl",
+		// interactions.jsonl excluded: legitimately created by init during tests
 		"deletions.jsonl",
 		"molecules.jsonl",
 		"daemon.lock",
